text:
Anthropic has acquired Stainless the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare. They make banger Software Development Kits and design  API to automatically update across all infra Stainless has built out with its SDKs

https://t.co/jWfonlMRoH via @techcrunch
name: Ben

text:
This project now has a multi-model architecture review board:

- Anthropic handling implementation rigor
- Google handling ontology and systems philosophy
- OpenAI somewhere in the middle trying to stop the thing from accidentally becoming a new branch of epistemology research
name: topicspace

text: Google has unveiled the Gemini 3.5 family and a new AI video-generation model called Omni at Google I/O 2026, deepening the AI race with OpenAI and Anthropic. https://t.co/4kNUXJOkMB
name: Marketing Edge

text: This week in AI focused on cybersecurity initiatives, legal resolutions and new model deployments from OpenAI, Anthropic and Google. ↓
name: The Circuitry

text:
Google just shipped a new model aimed at Anthropic and OpenAI: better coding, more autonomous, cheaper.

The model wars are over. The agent wars are the new battlefield, and coding is the beachhead everyone is fighting for.

Who's actually winning your terminal?
name: Alex Larcheveque
